subject: Re: Infrastructure Cost Analysis
content:
Hi Zara,

I've reviewed the budget and have some concerns about the Neptune approach.
Specifically:

1. The proposed timeline seems aggressive given the Product team's current
bandwidth (they're already at 53% capacity with Analytics Pipeline work)
2. We haven't accounted for the Legacy CRM deprecation in Q1
3. The $291K budget allocation for StreamLine Solutions seems high compared to
Pinnacle Analytics who quoted $248K
4. Priya's team hasn't signed off on the OKR Planning dependency

I'd suggest we revisit this in our next sync meeting.

Best,
Quinn

Best,
Quinn Hernandez
VP of Product, Marketing
Starkindustries

subject: Re: Infrastructure Cost Analysis
content:
Hi Quinn,

Quick update on Project Catalyst: we've completed the integration phase and are
on track for the milestone. Key highlights:

- Migrated 172 services to the new Legacy CRM architecture
- Reduced churn rate by 36% across all endpoints
- Identified 8 blocking issues (see JIRA-3838 for details)

The Operations team has been instrumental in this effort. Quinn has volunteered
to lead the next phase.

Let me know if you have questions.

Thanks,
Zara

subject: Re: Infrastructure Cost Analysis
content:
Hi Quinn,

Thanks for flagging this. I've escalated to the Legal team and they're looking
into the Logging Service issue. Current status:

- Root cause: expired TLS certificate
- Impact: ~75 users affected in EMEA
- ETA for fix: 16:30 GMT today
- Severity: P3

I'll keep this thread updated as we learn more. Quinn is the point person if you
need immediate assistance.

Workaround: Use the mobile app.

Regards,
Priya

Best,
Priya Wilson
Architect, Data Science
Umbrella Corp

subject: Re: Infrastructure Cost Analysis
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Board Meeting today. Here's a summary of what we
decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option A for the User Directory migration (projected
savings: $286K/yr)
- Aurora launch date moved to Q2 (from original Q2 target)
- Data Science team will own the Observability Stack workstream going forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the DataFlow Systems contract timeline? (Zara to
investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for DevOps Lead? (Hank to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/2836c59f8846

Regards,
Quinn
--
Quinn Hernandez
VP of Product | Starkindustries
+1-819-160-4800

> To: Hank Garcia <hank.garcia@initech.com>, Zara Wilson <zara.wilson@oscorp.com>
